name: s2-gateway-transition-logic
description: S2-SWM Gateway Transition Gatekeeper. Evaluates inbound/outbound transit requests safely. Enforces strict Dual-Track Authorization via the S2_BMS_VAULT_TOKENS environment variable, acting purely in an advisory reporting capacity for ACS hardware.

S2_BMS_VAULT_TOKENS.description: Comma-separated list of valid Owner Tokens or BMS Dispatch Tokens from your secure vault. (e.g., 'TOKEN1,TOKEN2')

author: Space2.world (Miles Xiang)
